title: Day 1: Unit 1: 新朋友与学校 - Part 1

dialogues.speaker: dad
dialogues.en: Good morning, Guangtou! Time to go to school.
dialogues.zh: 早上好，光头！该去上学了。

dialogues.speaker: son
dialogues.en: Good morning, Dad! Where is my pencil?
dialogues.zh: 早上好，爸爸！我的铅笔在哪儿？

dialogues.speaker: mom
dialogues.en: Here it is. And do you have your ruler?

dialogues.speaker: son
dialogues.en: Yes, I have a ruler. Goodbye, Mom!
dialogues.zh: 带了，我有一把尺子。妈妈再见！

dialogues.speaker: daughter
dialogues.en: Bye, brother!

quiz.question:
根据中文提示，选择正确的单词：

你好

dialogues.speaker: daughter
dialogues.en: Bye, brother!

quiz.question:
根据中文提示，选择正确的单词：

你叫什么名字？

title: Day 11: Unit 2: 五彩的世界 - Part 1

dialogues.speaker: daughter
dialogues.en: Look at my new drawing!

dialogues.speaker: son
dialogues.en: Wow, it is very nice. I see green and blue.
dialogues.zh: 哇，真好看。我看到了绿色和蓝色。

dialogues.speaker: mom
dialogues.en: Show me red, Niuniu.

dialogues.speaker: daughter
dialogues.en: OK, here it is!

dialogues.speaker: dad
dialogues.en: Great job, kids.

quiz.question:
根据中文提示，选择正确的单词：

早上好！

title: Day 21: Unit 3: 奇妙的身体 - Part 1

dialogues.speaker: mom
dialogues.en: Wash your face, Guangtou. Your face is dirty.
dialogues.zh: 洗洗你的脸，光头。你的脸有点脏。

dialogues.speaker: son
dialogues.en: OK, Mom. Look at me! This is my clean face.
dialogues.zh: 好的，妈妈。看着我！这是我干净的脸。

dialogues.speaker: dad
dialogues.en: Now clap your hands and stamp your foot.

dialogues.speaker: daughter
dialogues.en: Hahaha! I can stamp my foot too!

quiz.question:
根据中文提示，选择正确的单词：

脸

title: Day 31: Unit 4: 动物朋友 - Part 1

dialogues.speaker: son
dialogues.en: Look! What is that?

dialogues.speaker: dad
dialogues.en: It is a funny dog.

dialogues.speaker: daughter
dialogues.en: I like dogs. What is this?

dialogues.speaker: mom
dialogues.en: It is a duck. Act like a duck, Guangtou!
dialogues.zh: 这是一只鸭子。光头，学一下鸭子！

dialogues.speaker: son
dialogues.en: Quack, quack! Hahaha!

quiz.question:
根据中文提示，选择正确的单词：

猫

dialogues.en: It is a funny dog.

dialogues.speaker: daughter
dialogues.en: I like dogs. What is this?

dialogues.speaker: mom
dialogues.en: It is a duck. Act like a duck, Guangtou!
dialogues.zh: 这是一只鸭子。光头，学一下鸭子！

dialogues.speaker: son
dialogues.en: Quack, quack! Hahaha!

quiz.question:
根据中文提示，选择正确的单词：

看！一只搞笑的狗。

title: Day 41: Unit 5: 美味食物 - Part 1

dialogues.speaker: son
dialogues.en: Mom, I am hungry.

dialogues.speaker: mom
dialogues.en: Have some bread, Guangtou. Dinner is coming.
dialogues.zh: 吃点面包吧，光头。晚饭马上就好。

dialogues.speaker: daughter
dialogues.en: I would like some juice, please.

dialogues.speaker: dad
dialogues.en: Here you are. Can I have some water?

dialogues.speaker: daughter
dialogues.en: Sure. Let's eat!

quiz.question:
根据中文提示，选择正确的单词：

我饿了。

title: Day 51: Unit 6: 数字与游戏 - Part 1

dialogues.speaker: dad
dialogues.en: Happy birthday, Guangtou! How old are you?
dialogues.zh: 生日快乐，光头！你几岁了？

dialogues.speaker: son
dialogues.en: Thank you, Dad! I am ten.

dialogues.speaker: mom
dialogues.en: Look at the cake! How many candles?
dialogues.zh: 看这个蛋糕！有几根蜡烛？

dialogues.speaker: daughter
dialogues.en: Let's count! One, two, three... ten!
dialogues.zh: 我们来数一数！一，二，三……十！

quiz.question:
根据中文提示，选择正确的单词：

一
